zh.lifeSummary: 當Marian Abernethy於1371年出生在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安時，她的父親William Abernethy 6th Laird of Saltoun11368歲，母親Mary Stewart5歲。她和Robert Maitland至少有5個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1466年在英國蘇格蘭費伏享年95歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Abernethy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Abernathy
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Abernethy in southeastern Perthshire. The placename is of Pictish origin, meaning ‘mouth of the river Nethy’.

History: This was the name of a cadet branch of MacDuff earls of Fife and one of the surnames of the Scots who settled in northern Ireland during the ‘plantation’ in the 17th century, and it was brought to the US as the name of a Southern plantation owner (in a different sense of the word ‘plantation’).

nameMeanings.name: Marian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a medieval variant spelling of   Marion .  However, in the 18th century, when combined names began to come into fashion, it was sometimes understood as a combination of   Mary   and   Ann .

en.lifeSummary: When Marian Abernethy was born in 1371, in East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, William Abernethy 6th Laird of Saltoun, was 11368 and her mother, Mary Stewart, was 5. She had at least 5 sons and 4 daughters with Robert Maitland. She died in 1466, in Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 95, and was buried in Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marian Abernethy est née en 1371, à East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Abernethy 6th Laird of Saltoun, avait 11368 ans et sa mère, Mary Stewart, avait 5 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles avec Robert Maitland. Elle est décédée en 1466, à Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 95 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marian Abernethy 1371 in East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Abernethy 6th Laird of Saltoun 11368 und ihre Mutter Mary Stewart 5. Sie hatte mit Robert Maitland mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1466 im Alter von 95 Jahren in Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marian Abernethy è nata il nel 1371 nel East Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Abernethy 6th Laird of Saltoun, aveva 11368 anni e sua madre, Mary Stewart, aveva 5 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie con Robert Maitland. Morì nel 1466, nel Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 95 anni, e fu sepolta a Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Marian Abernethyが1371年にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンで生まれた時，父William Abernethy 6th Laird of Saltounは11368歳，母Mary Stewartは5歳であった。彼女はRobert Maitlandとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1466年にイギリススコットランドフィフで95歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marian Abernethy(이)가 1371년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Abernethy 6th Laird of Saltoun(은)는 11368세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Stewart(은)는 5세였다. 그녀는 Robert Maitland(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1466년 영국 스코틀랜드 피프에서 95세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marian Abernethy родилась в 1371 г. в местности эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Abernethy 6th Laird of Saltoun было 11368 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Stewart, 5. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери от Robert Maitland. Она умерла в 1466 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 95 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия, Великобритания.
